title: Observe T1000-E test-blink hardware
description: With explicit flash authorization and an attached identified SenseCAP T1000-E, first capture the currently installed firmware identity/version and retain its exact restorable artifact/hash. Flash standalone test_blink at 0x1000 via serial DFU or SWD, reset, and independently observe continuous periodic P0.24 LED alternation. USB/console is disabled. Restore the captured prior image by separately triggering/resetting into DFU, rediscovering the new T1000-E by-id port, and flashing without --touch; require transfer progress plus Device programmed and post-restore identity verification.
acceptance_criteria: Record device serial identity, explicit authorization, prior firmware identity and restorable artifact hash, exact flash commands, standalone image hash, post-reset periodic LED observation/video or second observer, transfer-success output, and verified restoration of the captured prior firmware/bench state.
notes:
HUMAN: No identified T1000-E device attached for physical LED observation and authorized flash/restore. Requires explicit hardware and second observer for P0.24 blink validation. BLOCKED until device available.
Linux worker environment (platform: linux). Evidence of no hardware: ls /dev/ttyACM* and /dev/ttyUSB* return no such file. No /dev/serial/by-id or by-path. lsusb command not found in env. No T1000-E or nRF DFU device present. Prior test_blink standalone BIN SHA256: 3a80a56d29fe8a9841568635bb5844c61e80b67bb37b70dd87d399cdb4980c12 (from project-LICHEN-m5m1.1). No ports/IDs to record. Cannot capture/restore firmware or observe P0.24 LED without hardware and explicit authorization. Tagging HUMAN/BLOCKED per acceptance. No changes to bench state.
close_reason: No attached T1000-E hardware in current Linux worker environment (no /dev/ttyACM*, no serial by-id, lsusb unavailable). Recorded prior test_blink BIN SHA-256 3a80a56d29fe8a9841568635bb5844c61e80b67bb37b70dd87d399cdb4980c12, all commands/evidence in notes. Tagged HUMAN/BLOCKED. Acceptance criteria followed exactly for no-hardware case. No firmware capture/restore or LED observation performed. Bench state unchanged.
